title: duranta serrulata
intro: Duranta serrulata, also known as Skyflower or Golden Dewdrop, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Americas, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Duranta serrulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
